demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged-care facility (nursing home); bedbound and needs maximal assistance with all turning and personal care

contact_nok.relationship: residential aged-care nursing staff (present at the bedside)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is on fire down there, it feels like it is tearing open every time I move. (Reported by the patient, with nursing staff on the call describing what they can see.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Nursing staff called because over the last 12 hours the skin in both groins and the fold under the belly has become agonisingly painful, has cracked, and is now bleeding whenever the patient is moved, and the patient is refusing all washing and turning because of the pain.

symptom_narrative.onset: redness in the deep skin folds under the tummy and in both groins started about 3 days ago; over the last 12 hours it turned into a severe burning pain
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days of redness, 12 hours of severe pain
symptom_narrative.character: began as intense itching, now a severe burning, 'on fire' feeling with a sense that the skin is tearing open
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonising; the patient will not let staff wash or turn them because of the pain
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the deep creases of both groins and the fold under the belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse; worst on any movement
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; only lying completely still helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, being turned, and being wet from incontinence
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the skin is cracked and bleeds when moved; nursing staff have noticed a white curd-like material and a bad smell in the deepest creases
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: entirely bedbound; needs maximal help for all turning and hygiene; the pain is now preventing essential care and repositioning

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a urinary infection recently, being treated with strong antibiotics
past_medical_history.how_managed: on a course of broad-spectrum antibiotics prescribed for the urinary infection

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: unable to move or walk — bedbound and needs full help with all care
wets themselves (urinary incontinence), so the skin in the folds is often damp

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: broad-spectrum antibiotics for a recent urinary infection

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a nursing home and is cared for by nursing staff; the room is very warm and the patient sweats a lot in the folds

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading taken by nursing staff on a ward thermometer
single reading on a ward blood-pressure cuff

objective_data_offered.value: bright red, raw, weeping skin deep in both groin creases and the fold under the belly, with cracks that bleed when the patient is moved
small separate red spots and little pus-spots in the skin just beyond the edge of the main red area
a white curd-like material and a distinct bad smell in the deepest creases
the incontinence pad is heavily soaked and the room is very warm
the patient grimaces and guards the pelvic area with any movement and is very distressed
